extension.summary: Dual subtitle picker with smart auto-selection
extension.description:
Kodi subtitle addon focused on dual subtitles only.
The addon opens from the subtitle search screen and supports: - Smart start folder selection (current video directory first) - Auto matching for two preferred subtitle languages - Manual fallback with fewer navigation steps - Smart Sync for large subtitle timing drift - Existing dual-subtitle style and timing options
extension.news:
beta 0.4 (2026-03-11) - Added Smart Sync for large subtitle drift (separate from Auto Shift) - Smart Sync now detects likely mismatch and asks whether to run sync - Added manual target/reference selection (reference can be any .srt in video folder) - Added low-confidence flow with optional AI anchor fallback - Synced target subtitle is saved with backup at *.srt.bak; temporary playback fallback is used if writing fails
v2.2.0 (2026-03-11) - Added a popup choice when preferred subtitles are missing: translate or continue without translation - Added source subtitle picker for translation (choose any .srt in the video folder) - Added support to translate both preferred languages from one source subtitle when both are missing - Improved translation flow so the user controls translation per playback
v2.1.0 (2026-03-11) - Added optional OpenAI translation for partial auto-match results - Writes translated subtitle files next to the source subtitle (for example Movie-ru.srt) - Added translation progress dialog and OpenAI settings (API key, model, batch size, timeout) - Improved single-subtitle fallback when only one preferred language is found
v2.0.0 (2026-03-10) - Rebranded as Dual Subtitles - Removed single subtitle and Kodi-settings selection modes - Added preferred language auto-match in current video folder - Added smarter browse start folder and last-used subtitle folder fallback
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
